items.name: /e invisible (works in every game)
items.description:
Slip completely out of sight with this fade-out emote—become invisible and move like a silent, stealthy ghost. Ideal for roleplay, magical moments, dramatic entrances, or perfectly timed exits.

Tags: hide, hidden animation, invisible, invis, invisibility, conceal, disguise, stealth, ghost, unseen, vanish, transparent, cloaked, camo, camouflage, disappear

This emote was created in full accordance with Roblox’s validation requirements and complies with all applicable rules as of its upload date.
